title: Technic Building Set with Cool Lights, 5 in 1 APP Remote Control Robot Tank Building Toy, RC Tracked Racer 604 PCS, Building Block Birthday Gift for Kids Boys Girls Ages 6 7 8 9 10 11 12+
features: 5-in-1 Creative Technic Building Toy: Unlock endless creativity with PLAXSOON 5-in-1 RC technic building set! Kids can build a racing tank, robotic, stunt car, tracked vehicle, or snowmobile—all from 600+ building bricks. This hands-on educational toy combines science, technology, engineering, and math, helping children enhance problem-solving skills while having fun experimenting with different designs

Dynamic Cool Lights & Rechargeable Battery: More than just speed, this technic building toy glows! When turned on, it shines with bright blue light, and as it moves, the colors shift between blue, green, and purple, creating a mini light show. Equipped with a 300mAh rechargeable battery, it runs up to about 20 minutes per charge, no more constant battery replacements, keeping the fun going with every adventure

High-Power Motor & All-Terrain Grip: Get ready for real excitement! Experience thrilling speed and strength! Powered by a 7.4V motor, this tank building block toy delivers up to 680 RPM and 2.5 KGf.cm torque, outperforming standard 3.7V motors. The anti-slip track design ensures smooth, stable driving on both polished floors and rough terrain, giving kids an exciting challenge in every environment

Dual Control with App & Remote: Take control your way! Operate via the 2.4GHz remote (30–50m range) or through the free app. Choose from 4 play modes such as Path, Gyro, Drive, and Programming for unique driving experiences. Kids can race, code, and explore interactive play, making every game session more exciting and endlessly re-playable

Perfect Gift for Kids Ages 6 - 12+: A fun, educational gift that inspires imagination and teamwork! Perfect for boys and girls ages 6 7 8 9 10 11 12+, this 5 in 1 technic building block set encourages parent-child interaction and group play. Whether it’s for birthday, Christmas, Easter, or any holiday gift, this RC building toy delivers creativity, excitement, and unforgettable playtime.
